capture_method: Default metalmind install advertises zero MCP tools. Recall is a stamped bash command (metalmind tap copper) that Claude reaches for naturally via instructions in ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md. The loopback HTTP server at 127.0.0.1:17317 is the transport; Claude does not see it as a tool.
notes: The instruction block stamped into CLAUDE.md IS billed as tokens, but it is a one-time ~20-line prose block, not a per-turn JSON schema. The instruction tokens are measured separately in results.json under 'instruction_block_tokens'.
